Caller must be the steward (or an owner of stewardAccount)."}},"title":"GeoFeatureRegistry","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"COORD_SCALE()":{"notice":"Coordinate scale: stored value = round(degrees * 1e7)."},"bindName(bytes32,bytes32)":{"notice":"Bind a `.geo` name node to this feature."},"deactivate(bytes32)":{"notice":"Mark the latest version of a feature inactive (e.g. annexed boundary)."},"featureForName(bytes32)":{"notice":"nameNode \u2192 featureId. A given .geo name binds to exactly one feature."},"getLatest(bytes32)":{"notice":"Convenience: the most recent published version for a feature."},"latestVersion(bytes32)":{"notice":"featureId \u2192 highest published version."},"publish(bytes32,bytes32,address,bytes32,bytes32,bytes32,string,int256,int256,int256,int256,int256,int256,uint64,uint64)":{"notice":"Publish a new version of a feature."},"setValidity(bytes32,uint64,uint64,uint64)":{"notice":"Update the validity window of a published version (e.g. set sunset date)."}},"notice":"Versioned, name-bound registry of geographic features. The registry stores small, indexable summaries; canonical geometry lives off-chain (GeoJSON RFC 7946 / WKT) and is anchored on-chain by `geometryHash` (keccak256 of the canonical-encoded payload). On-chain fields are deliberately kept to indexable scalars and Merkle roots:   \u2022 centroid (lat/lon as int256 * 1e7)  \u2014 coarse map placement only   \u2022 bbox     (4 \u00d7 int256 * 1e7)          \u2014 coarse pre-filter only   \u2022 h3CoverageRoot (bytes32)             \u2014 Merkle root over the H3 cells                                             (resolution 6 default) covering                                             this feature's geometry. Used                                             by `GeoH3Inclusion`                                             ZK proofs for private claim                                             matching without revealing                                             the holder's exact H3 cell.   \u2022 sourceSetRoot (bytes32)              \u2014 Merkle root over the source                                             dataset records (e.g. census                                             tract ids, OSM relation ids)                                             this feature was derived from,                                             so verifiers can audit                                             provenance without storing                                             the entire dataset. Names (.geo and any ancestor: us.geo, colorado.us.geo, \u2026) are HANDLES, not spatial truth. Each feature can have many name bindings over time, and each name binding can be re-pointed to a new featureVersion when boundaries change without invalidating prior claims that reference the older version. Claim writes do NOT happen here \u2014 see `GeoClaimRegistry`. This contract is the source of truth for \"what is feature F at version V\".","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/GeoFeatureRegistry.sol":"GeoFeatureRegistry"},"evmVersion":"prague","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/contracts/",":account-abstraction/=lib/account-abstraction/contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/AgentNameRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0xccbf1b04bdbba137f13f04f6d726cc908dff3a85b0d103b61f3f483af3b52aee","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://5cdb8e0eea33a437d0b2dd70a1af0e402d97b1f72b25c475eb02e9e8c0e92349","dweb:/ipfs/QmQkH6B9jF1H6rSxyGPMtjpc2NSkuPzudbPcMS5KrgpYWD"]},"src/AgentRelationship.sol":{"keccak256":"0x79063025928424d79229b22cb8c68783ac9ff3527cb5f2b2a92cf44aaf56a3bf","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://448c147db1a31c6526a37a05fe4be4dbd161984b2832e5ee552dc876c48c1762","dweb:/ipfs/QmYBgjKDKHRXrdLkvK7FZwisnfed4qnf764Atb3YXtmuW3"]},"src/GeoFeatureRegistry.sol":{"keccak256":"0x8010477e12013f9867f75ab3710b8b7fe267f652b18a54bef8bdee53e0a5e809","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8db0bce52dd84cff48383aaccbe1da03c70d278dac0a8ecc2e0ca56780b085d2","dweb:/ipfs/QmUMCmrjbppyeG3iNRmE8883o3Vz1wCzg6ube8dKyszf1K"]}},"version":1}

bindName(bytes32,bytes32).details: Caller must be the name's owner AND the feature's steward.

publish(bytes32,bytes32,address,bytes32,.details: featureId is stable across versions; version monotonically      increments. The first call for a given featureId starts at v1.      Caller must be the steward (or an owner of stewardAccount).

bindName(bytes32,bytes32).notice: Bind a `.geo` name node to this feature.

deactivate(bytes32).notice: Mark the latest version of a feature inactive (e.g. annexed boundary).

featureForName(bytes32).notice: nameNode → featureId. A given .geo name binds to exactly one feature.

getLatest(bytes32).notice: Convenience: the most recent published version for a feature.

publish(bytes32,bytes32,address,bytes32,.notice: Publish a new version of a feature.

setValidity(bytes32,uint64,uint64,uint64.notice: Update the validity window of a published version (e.g. set sunset date).
